use_cases: Displaying loading states during async operations
Indicating page transitions or data fetching
Showing progress indicators in waiting scenarios
Branding loading screens with stylized neon effects
ai_summary: A minimalist neon-styled text loader component that displays 'Loading' with a glowing visual effect. The component uses CSS classes for neon container and text styling, making it suitable for adding visual flair to loading states in web applications. Simple atomic component designed for easy integration into any loading scenario.
